reason: Verified that the agent successfully opened a browser, navigated to https://example.com, retrieved the page title "Example Domain", and reported it back in the chat response.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Successfully loaded the Gamut home page showing the agents list.
Found and clicked on the "QA-20260717-013120-odnr" agent in the sidebar — Successfully navigated to the agent's chat page at http://localhost:47891/agents/qa-20260717-013120-odnr-uqza4nkhrc.
Sent message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." — Successfully typed the message in the input field and sent it using Cmd+Enter, creating a new session.
Waited up to 3 minutes for the response — The agent completed processing in 14 seconds, successfully executing all required browser tools (Open Browser, Browser Get State, Close Browser).

Verified the response mentions "Example Domain" — The agent's final response clearly states: "The page title is 'Example Domain'." and "The page at https://example.com has the title 'Example Domain'. Browser closed." The response successfully mentions "Example Domain" as required.
